!!!`Experimental DPS stats `
* `Ch (t)s` = Damage/second done `t` seconds before an enemy goes down 
* `Bur (t)s` = Maximum damage/second done over any `t` second interval 
* `Ch5Ca (t)s` = Maximum Chunk(5) + Carrion damage/second done over any `t` second interval
